results.title: Contraception
results.creator_credit: Pauline Shaw and Granada Television International
results.brief_description:
Episode of Series “The Facts Are These”.
The most important aspect of family planning is to avoid the unwanted child. Baroness Birk describes to young people the irresponsibility of creating such a child and the damaging psychological, radical and social effects on both the child and the parents. Advice for young people on all types of sexual matters is provided by Family Planning Association Clinics and Brooke Advisory Centre. An animated sequence on the mechanic of conception is included.

results.title: Caring for the mind
results.creator_credit: Pauline Shaw and Granada Television International
results.brief_description:
Episode of Series “The Facts Are These”.
Details some of the stresses, strains and speed of modern living which have made mental illness a common occurrence. Types of treatment and care of the mentally ill are explained.

results.title: An Apple a day
results.creator_credit: Pauline Shaw and Granada International Productions
results.brief_description:
Episode of Series “The Facts Are These”.
Made before eating disorders were recognised as serious diseases, this documentary focuses on a hospital dietitian, a dentist and women in a dieting club as they discuss the evils of overeating. It also highlights the importance of good nutrition and regular exercise in maintaining a slender figure.

results.title: Another little drink
results.brief_description:
Episode of Series “The Facts Are These”.
Opens with groups of people enjoying a social evening in a pub and using alcohol sensibly. An animated sequence follows which corrects commonly held misconceptions about alcohol and details its effects on the brain and the senses. The work of a hospital Alcoholism Treatment Unit is detailed and a psychiatrist explains the stages in the treatment of alcoholics admitted to the Unit and we look in on a group undergoing treatment. The important role of organisations such as Alcoholics Anonymous and regional councils on alcoholism is stressed.

results.title: Takahide Saita: shipyard foreman
results.brief_description:
Episode of Series “The Faces of Japan”
Focuses on the life of a shipyard worker in Tokyo, his work on ship construction, his position within the company, his relationship to his workers and his family life.

group_siblings.title: Atsushi Chiba: mechanical engineer
group_siblings.creator_credit: Keizai Koho Senta (Tokyo, Japan)

results.title: Atsushi Chiba: mechanical engineer
results.brief_description:
Episode of Series “The Faces of Japan”.
Atsushi Chiba is a 30 year old engineer at an auto-parts factory north of Tokyo. This documentary focuses on the technical and social aspects of his working environment and touches on attitudes and aspirations in his family life.

results.title: The Enlightenment
results.media_note: Sorry, we don't have images or video for this item.

results.title: The Marriage of Figaro
results.brief_description:
Episode of Series “The Enlightenment”.
Consists of three scenes from Beaumarchais’ play “The Marriage of Figaro” and the same scenes from Mozart’s opera. The following scenes are performed - Act V. Part of Figaro’s monologue and part of Figaro’s aria. Act III. The duet between the Count and Susanna. Act II. Part of the scene in which Susanna is discovered in the Countess’s dressing room.(the beginning of the finale of Act II of the opera).
